caribbean.headline: Small Craft Advisory in Effect for Turks and Caicos Waters
caribbean.paragraph: Turks and Caicos is experiencing sustained easterly winds near 23 knots with significant wave heights reaching 7.2 feet and an 8-second swell period. Rain chances are moderate at 52 percent, creating conditions that warrant a Small Craft Advisory for mariners in the area.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain Hits Dubrovnik Amid Calm Winds and Low Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing heavy rain with a 92% probability while winds remain light at 10 knots and wave heights hold steady at 3.1 feet with a dominant west swell direction. Conditions are stable at Haifa with moderate winds at 14 knots and no significant wave activity expected.
